directive.title: Mobile Responsive — Per-Page Audit for Non-Shared Grids and Tables

auditor.summary: The build fails to meet acceptance criteria due to multiple critical issues: (1) Only 2 of 4 required page files were generated, (2) The required Playwright test file was not created, (3) TypeScript compilation will fail due to importing non-existent 'GenericPageSkeleton' export from Skeletons.tsx, (4) KpiCard component is used with incorrect prop names ('title' instead of 'label', non-existent 'trend' prop) that don't match the actual component interface, (5) data-testid attributes on KpiCard components will not render to DOM since the component doesn't pass through unknown props. The build is incomplete and would not compile. Score is capped at 40 due to these critical buildability and completeness failures.

top_issues.description: Imports 'GenericPageSkeleton' from '../../../components/ui/Skeletons' but this export does not exist. The actual Skeletons.tsx exports: KPISkeleton, PanelSkeleton, TableSkeleton, AlertSkeleton, OverviewSkeleton. This will cause a TypeScript compilation error.
Same issue - imports 'GenericPageSkeleton' which does not exist in Skeletons.tsx. Will cause compilation failure.
The Playwright test file specified in the build spec was not created. This is a required file per the build specification.
